purpose: Stable LLM model policy for CaliberGraph experiments. Use these channels and models according to experimental need; use the full list for cross-model comparison panels.

key_mapping_note.relay: Provider credential is resolved at runtime by the local LLM router. This route is used for claude-opus-4-6.
key_mapping_note.gpt-provider: Provider credential is resolved at runtime by the local LLM router. This route is the GPT-5.x / group-B-capable group and is used for gpt-5.5.
key_mapping_note.secret_policy: Keys are loaded only at runtime from a user-local environment file and must not be written to repository artifacts.
